nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Thick-billed kingbird
nodes.summary: Thick-billed kingbird（Thick-billed kingbird，学名 Tyrannus crassirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于恰帕斯州，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 恰帕斯州
nodes.summary: 恰帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括角冠雉、小灰頭稚冠雉、眼斑吐綬雞等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | pages =412–413 }} The subspecies has also strayed further north in Arizona and to British Colombia, California, Colorado, and Baja California. The nominate subspecies is found on the western side of Mexico from Colima south to Chiapas and occasionally occurs in western Guatemala. The thick-billed kingbird inhabits different landscapes in different parts of its range

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Further south it is found within tropical deciduous forest and less frequently in riparian zones and in the far south it is found in riparian zones within arid scrublands. In elevation it ranges as high as
